prompt: Create a vertical 2:3 anime-style fantasy illustration of a young Japanese woman named Aoi standing full-body on a steep stone stairway lined with blooming blue hydrangeas. She wears an ornate dark navy and black short kimono-inspired outfit with wide flowing sleeves, gold embroidery, blue floral appliqués, layered lace trim, a red-and-gold obi belt with dangling tassels, blue ribbons, black thigh-high stockings with gold patterns, and decorative geta sandals. Her dark hair is styled with large black-and-blue bow ornaments and blue flower hair accessories; keep her face softly beautiful and unobscured. She poses gracefully with one hand slightly raised, looking toward the viewer. The scene is a sparkling coastal hillside town at golden-blue twilight, overlooking a bright bay, distant mountains, rooftops, utility poles, and shimmering water. Surround her with luminous blue petals, tiny glowing orbs, drifting white feathers, sun rays from the upper left, and magical bokeh highlights. On the right side, include a small dark sign beside a metal railing with the Japanese text 小筑紫. Use a highly detailed polished anime illustration style, photorealistic lighting adapted into painterly fantasy art, rich sapphire and indigo color palette, intricate fabric detail, cinematic depth, radiant rim light, and dreamy romantic atmosphere. No watermark, no blurred face, no extra characters, no modern UI elements.
